description: Get dressed in these wedges from catwalk for a fun ethnic look. The beaded straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.UpperThong style straps for durability and protectionHeavy sequin work for styleSynthetic lining for soft comfortMidsoleSynthetic footbed with stitch detailing for durability and styleOutsoleWedge heels for better supportTPU outsole with patterned grooves on the forefoot for extra gripSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
